text: The termination of connected vehicle service pursuant to this article shall not be deemed to impact legal ownership of a vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 6. Connected Vehicle Service [28200 - 28244]
#### Article 2. Access to Connected Vehicle Service [28220 - 28228]
##### § 28228

The termination of connected vehicle service pursuant to this article shall not be deemed to impact legal ownership of a vehicle.

*(Added by Stats. 2024, Ch. 655, Sec. 2. (SB 1394) Effective January 1, 2025. Operative July 1, 2025, pursuant to Sec. 28206.)*

subsections.text: The termination of connected vehicle service pursuant to this article shall not be deemed to impact legal ownership of a vehicle.
